title: Alex's Alarms and Sirens
description: A fabric mod aimed at adding different types of alarms and sirens to the game.
body:
A fabric mod aimed at adding different types of alarms and sirens to the game.

Currently the amount of features in this mod is limited since I just started but I plan on adding more, join the discord and suggest me ideas.


**Blocks:**

Smoke Detector (can detect fire within a 4x4x4 area under the detector

Universal Alarm (can be activated/deactivated with redstone)


**Items:**

KAC Key 1 (no function at all right now)

KAC Key 2 (no function at all right now)


**Links:**

[Discord](https://discord.gg/xaGMZVHfbN) (report bugs and request features here)
